response.global_summary: A two-song performance featuring virtual characters (VTubers). The first song is 'Hoshizora e to Tsuzuku Sakamichi' by Revo, performed by a blue mascot character, and the second is 'Isekai Kyousoukyoku' by Seino Kentaro, performed by the virtual character Shirakami Fubuki.

scenes.description: Animated blue cat mascot character starts singing as the title '星空へと続く坂道' and artist 'Revo' appear on screen.
